claim: p_{n+1}q_n - p_n q_{n+1} = (-1)^n for the convergents of q_n=b_n q_{n-1}+q_{n-2} (discrete Wronskian flips sign each step).
evidence: Lean: casoratian_step, casoratian_eq, pq_casoratian. Clean axiom cone via #print axioms (no sorryAx).

claim: R_n -> R_infinity exists by monotone-bounded convergence for the scaled recurrence r_{n+2}=r_{n+1}+u_{n+2} r_n, u>=0.
evidence: Lean: rseq_ge_one, rseq_mono, rseq_le_rmaj, rseq_bddAbove_of_rmaj, rseq_tendsto_of_rmaj_bddAbove. Clean cone.
conditional: partial products bounded above (sum u_n < infinity)

evidence: Lean: psum, rseq_ge_one_add_psum, rmaj_mul_one_sub_psum_le_one, rinf_bracket, rseq_tendsto_under_psum_bdd. Clean cone. Gate: bracket_gate.py.
conditional: sum u_n < infinity and S = sup_n S_n < 1

claim: R_n = R_{n-1} + u_n R_{n-2}, u_n=1/(b_{n-1}b_n)>0; (R_n) strictly increasing, bounded by prod(1+u_k), R_inf-R_n = O(1/n^3).
evidence: Lemma 1, complete elementary hand proof. Finitary core formalized (see rinf-exists).

claim: R_n equals the weighted independence polynomial of the path graph on {2..n} at weights u_i; the finite-window polynomial decomposes into degree-graded cluster sums I = sum_k sigma_k.
evidence: Lean: indepPoly_eq_rseq (R_n = indep poly), indepPolyWin_succ_succ, indepKWin_succ_succ (graded sigma_k recurrence), indepPolyWin_eq_sum_indepKWin (graded reassembly). Clean axiom cone (no sorryAx). Exact DP check: continuant_verify.py.
conditional: the per-cluster bound sigma_k <= S^k and the infinite identity R_inf = sum_k sigma_k are the labelled hypotheses (H2),(H1) of cluster-enclosure, not proven here

claim: S = -sum_rho Res_rho psi(2-rho) (distinct poles); confluent polygamma form at repeated poles; S(1,2,1)=pi^2/3-13/4.
evidence: Proposition (S). Hand derivation via polygamma series (DLMF 5.15). Numeric: S_closed_form.py, S_confluent.py (35-62 digits).

claim: sigma_3 closed form sigma_3=(p1^3-3p1p2+2p3)/6-a1 p1+c+t (inclusion-exclusion). DO NOT cite as PROVEN: the cross-term a1*p1 permutes monomials across the index cube, so it is not a termwise Lean identity (it holds only after grouping equal monomials). The PROVEN sigma_3 object is the graded cluster sum (see sigma3-cluster).
evidence: Appendix A inclusion-exclusion hand proof (key identity Sigma(bad)=a1 p1-c-t). Exact finite-window gate: verify_sigma3_finite_window.py (4 b-families x windows {5,6,7,8} = 16 checks, residual EXACTLY 0 via Fraction arithmetic); verify_inclusion_exclusion.py (9 links ~1e-54); verify_clusters.py.

claim: R_n equals the subset-DP independence polynomial exactly for all tested triples and all n; sigma_k -> R_inf.
delta values for nine triples certified >=39 digits each, >=44 for (1,0,1): delta(1,0,1)=0.12385719436062639272850498970259084096757955...
evidence: hp_delta_v2.py, finalize_m2.py (exact downward recurrence, order-3 cluster seed); verify_forward_crosscheck.py (independent ~25-digit cross-check). Data: delta_values_m2.txt.

claim: delta has no low-height elementary closed form; delta is a new transcendental constant of the quadratic family; irrationality open.
evidence: hp_probe.py, pslq_stability.py: identify(V)=None at 100 digits, identify(delta)=None, PSLQ over {1,pi,log2,gamma,Catalan,zeta(3)} max|c|<=200 no relation, R_inf not algebraic deg<=4 height<=1e4; high-height vectors shown precision-unstable (artifacts). A null is a complete honest answer.

claim: sigma_2 closed form over the finite window: sigma_2 = e2 - a1 (degree-2 no-two-consecutive cluster sum equals elementary-symmetric e2 minus the adjacent-pair sum a1).
evidence: Lean: sigma2win_eq. Clean axiom cone (no sorryAx). Exact gate: verify_clusters.py.

claim: sigma_3 as the degree-3 graded cluster sum sigma3Win = indepKWin u 3 (sum over 3-element no-two-consecutive subsets) satisfies the deletion-contraction recurrence sigma_3(a,b+2) = sigma_3(a,b+1) + u_{b+2} * sigma_2(a,b).
evidence: Lean: sigma3Win_eq, sigma3Win_succ_succ (= k=2 instance of indepKWin_succ_succ). Clean axiom cone (no sorryAx). Numeric: subset-DP == cube check in verify_sigma3_finite_window.py. NOTE: this PROVEN object is distinct from the sigma23 closed form (STRUCTURAL).

claim: General Casoratian over any commutative ring for s(n+2)=c(n+2)s(n+1)+d(n)s(n): the Casoratian scales by -(d n) each step and equals (prod_{k<n} -(d k)) times its initial value; the classical (-1)^n law is the d=1 specialization.
evidence: Lean: IsSolG, IsSol.isSolG (axiom-free, empty cone), casoratian_stepG, casoratian_eqG, pq_casoratianG, casoratian_eqG_recovers_classical (faithfulness: derives (-1)^n from the general form at d=1). Clean cones. Numeric pre-gate: sympy (d(n)=n+1, c(n)=2n+3).

claim: Two-sided cluster-partial-sum enclosure L_m <= R_inf <= L_m + S^{m+1}/(1-S), hence log L_m <= delta <= log(L_m + S^{m+1}/(1-S)); the m=1 instance reproduces the bracket [log(1+S), -log(1-S)] exactly.
evidence: Lean: tsum_geomTail, Rinf_enclosure, delta_enclosure, m1_recovers_S_bracket, m1_delta_eq_S_bracket (m=1 endpoints are equalities; 0<L_1 derived not assumed), H2_zero_forces_sigma0_le_one, enclosure_nonvacuous. Clean cones. Gate: harness_rinf.py.
conditional: (H1) HasSum sigma R_inf; (H2) 0 <= sigma_k <= S^k for all k including k=0 (forcing sigma_0 <= 1); structural side-condition 0 < L_m

claim: Exact weighted partial-fraction telescoping for the B=0 family b_m=A m^2+C over any field: sum_{m=1}^{N-1} A(2m+1)/(b_m b_{m+1}) = 1/(A+C) - 1/(A N^2 + C). No characteristic assumption (2 appears only as a multiplier). The unweighted tail has NO rational closed form (Gosper: no rational telescoper); the unweighted coth/digamma limit is numeric-only, out of scope.
evidence: Lean: partialFraction, sum_Ico_telescope, weighted_telescope, weighted_telescope_value. Clean cones. Exact-rational gate: verify_telescope_b0.py (6 (A,C) families x 6 windows, residual EXACTLY 0 via Fraction). Gosper-null and coth limit checked in sympy/mpmath during development.

claim: Over R the weighted infinite sum equals the rational value 1/(A+C).
conditional: the single labelled analytic hypothesis Hw: 1/b_N -> 0 (equivalently A N^2 + C -> infinity)
